conj.statement: 1. Subtopic 3’s "actionable tools" demand clashes with Subtopic 1’s refusal of neutral translation (tools risk flattening). 2. Subtopic 4’s "physical displacement = erasure" conflicts with Subtopic 2’s "erasure via curriculum" (is it spatial or curricular?).
conj.cross_subtopic_needs: Rural/urban divides (Subtopics 2, 4, 5); Tribal sovereignty (Subtopics 1, 4); Translation infrastructure (Subtopics 1, 3, 5)
